query:
Plan a trip with the following preferences:
Origin: New York
Destination: Sharm El-Sheikh
Dates: 2026-11-19 to 2026-11-22
Budget: Balanced
Party: Couple
Interests: Eco Tourism, Cultural Tourism, Backpacking

results.assertion: Travel Plan correctly strictly follows the schema.
results.reason: The travel plan JSON structure is valid and adheres to a typical travel plan schema, including nested objects and arrays with appropriate data types.

results.assertion: Accommodation suggestions are relevant to the city and user preferences.
results.reason: The suggested hotel, JAZ Neo Naama Bay, is in Sharm El-Sheikh and is described as a 'mid-range hotel', aligning with the 'Balanced' budget and 'Couple' party type.

results.assertion: Budget constraints are respected throughout the itinerary.
results.reason: The user requested an origin of 'New York', but the budget breakdown explicitly states 'Estimated Flights/Transport: EGP 3000 (Round trip for 2 from Cairo)'. This budget is completely unrealistic for international flights from New York, thus disregarding the primary origin constraint.

results.assertion: The daily sequence of activities is logically ordered chronologically (morning, afternoon, evening).
results.reason: Activities within each day are scheduled in a logical chronological order from morning to evening.

judge_grader.reason: All specified constraints (destination, duration, budget level, number of people, and dates) are met by the travel plan.

generated_plan.trip_summary: A 4-day, 3-night balanced trip for a couple from Cairo to Sharm El-Sheikh, focusing on cultural exploration, eco-tourism, and backpacking-friendly experiences.

activities.title: Hotel Check-in: JAZ Neo Naama Bay
activities.description: Arrive in Sharm El-Sheikh and check into your mid-range hotel, JAZ Neo Naama Bay. Settle in and prepare for your adventure.

activities.title: Beautiful Place in South Sinai Governorate
activities.description: Start your cultural journey at this highly-rated popular tourist destination. Enjoy the unique atmosphere and take in the local culture.

activities.title: Street Art Exploration
activities.description: Discover vibrant Street Art installations, adding a modern cultural touch to your day in Sharm El-Sheikh.

activities.title: Lunch at Dananeer Restaurant Sea Food & Steak House
activities.description: Indulge in local and international cuisine with Chef's Specials at Dananeer, known for its seafood and steaks.

activities.title: Visit الفنار (El Fanar)
activities.description: Experience the beauty of El Fanar, another highly-rated cultural spot in Sharm El-Sheikh, offering picturesque views and unique charm.

activities.title: Explore Hollywood Sharm
activities.description: Spend your late afternoon at Hollywood Sharm, a lively cultural destination offering entertainment and a unique ambiance.

activities.title: Evening at Soho Square Dancing Fountain
activities.description: Conclude your day with a visit to the popular Soho Square Dancing Fountain, enjoying the spectacular water and light show.

activities.title: Dinner at Mahony Restaurant
activities.description: Enjoy a delightful dinner at Mahony Restaurant, offering a range of local and international dishes with its Chef's Specials.

activities.title: Visit The Echo Temple
activities.description: Begin your day with a trip to The Echo Temple, a blend of nature and culture, known for its unique atmosphere.

activities.title: Experience Peace Square
activities.description: Explore Peace Square, a significant cultural and natural attraction, offering a tranquil environment and historical insights.

activities.title: Lunch at La cucina degli artisti
activities.description: Savor a delicious lunch at La cucina degli artisti, featuring local and international cuisine.

activities.title: Enjoy the Best View in Sharm el Sheikh
activities.description: Head to a prime location to capture the best panoramic views of Sharm El-Sheikh, a truly memorable experience.

activities.title: Visit Paradise Sparrows
activities.description: Explore Paradise Sparrows, another popular cultural destination in Sharm El-Sheikh.

activities.title: Stroll down Pedestrian Rd Neama Bay
activities.description: Enjoy an evening walk along the bustling Pedestrian Road in Naama Bay, soaking in the lively atmosphere.

activities.title: Dinner at Verde Basilico, Italian Restaurant
activities.description: Enjoy a highly-rated Italian dinner at Verde Basilico, known for its Chef's Specials and international flair.

activities.title: Explore Ras Mohamed Nature Reserve
activities.description: Immerse yourselves in the natural beauty and cultural significance of Ras Mohamed Nature Reserve, a top-rated destination for eco-tourism.

activities.title: Visit Safari Sharm El Sheikh
activities.description: Experience the thrill of Safari Sharm El Sheikh, a cultural attraction offering unique insights into the local landscape.

activities.title: Lunch at Verde Basilico, Italian Restaurant
activities.description: Enjoy another delightful lunch at the highly-rated Verde Basilico Italian Restaurant.

activities.title: Discover Sinai Sharm
activities.description: Explore Sinai Sharm, a popular cultural spot that offers a glimpse into the region's heritage.

activities.title: Visit Turpigfd
activities.description: Uncover the unique charm of Turpigfd, a cultural destination providing a different perspective of Sharm El-Sheikh.

activities.title: Evening at SOHO Square Sharm El Sheikh
activities.description: Spend your evening at the vibrant SOHO Square Sharm El Sheikh, a hub of entertainment and culture.

activities.title: Dinner at La cucina degli artisti
activities.description: Conclude your day with dinner at La cucina degli artisti, known for its delectable local and international cuisine.

activities.title: Explore King Tut Museum
activities.description: Begin your final day with a visit to the King Tut Museum, delving into ancient Egyptian history and artifacts.

activities.title: Capture the Scritta SHARM landmark
activities.description: Visit the iconic 'Scritta SHARM' landmark, a popular spot for photos and enjoying the local ambiance.

activities.title: Lunch at Mahony Restaurant
activities.description: Enjoy a final lunch at Mahony Restaurant, savoring their Chef's Specials before your afternoon adventures.

activities.title: Experience El Sherif Safari
activities.description: Embark on an adventure at El Sherif Safari, a cultural experience offering a taste of the desert landscape.

activities.title: Visit Hollywood Sharm El Sheik
activities.description: Explore another entertainment and nature hub, Hollywood Sharm El Sheik, offering a vibrant atmosphere.

activities.title: Discover سفينة خربة (Sefeena Kharba)
activities.description: Visit سفينة خربة, a unique cultural site that offers a different perspective on local heritage.

activities.title: Farewell Dinner at Ebn hamido seafood
activities.description: Enjoy a final, highly-rated seafood dinner at Ebn hamido seafood, known for its Chef's Specials.

activities.title: Departure from Sharm El-Sheikh
activities.description: Check out from your hotel and head to the airport or bus station for your departure, concluding your memorable trip.

budget_breakdown: Estimated Flights/Transport: EGP 3000 (Round trip for 2 from Cairo)
Accommodation: EGP 3600 (3 nights at JAZ Neo Naama Bay)
Food & Dining: EGP 4000 (8 meals for 2 people at EGP 250/meal)
Activities & Sightseeing: EGP 4000 (20 attractions at EGP 200/attraction)
